sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91499" key="pulokleisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠλοκλειστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shutter</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">warden, of the gate, Documenti antichi dell' Africa italiana</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:101" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.101</biblScope> </bibl> (Cyrene, <date TEIform="date">i A.D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
